ref: The man got down on his knees and began begging, “Have pity on me, and I will pay you back.”
text: “Ɔkɔba a tɔ nɛ ye abɔa kamɛ eke ye aduli ɛlɛ kĩ, ‘Na ɔwɔlɛ bɔɛɛ kakpa yĩ! Maase nɔ kɔtɔ a!’
translated: "The child who was being chased by the animal said to his friend, 'Look at how fast it is running! I cannot outrun it!'"

ref: The men in the boat worshiped Jesus and said, “You really are the Son of God!” Jesus Heals Sick People in Gennesaret (Mark
text: Fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ nɛ ɔkɔlɔ a kamɛ a ke aduli bisum Yesu, ade bɛlɛ kĩ, “Nuwĩnuwĩ Baguma Obi anɛ!” Yesu Tsa Basɔnɛ Nɛ Genezaret.
translated: Then the people there begged Jesus to leave their area. So he got into a boat and went back across the lake to the town of Genessaret.

ref: John's followers took his body and buried it. Then they told Jesus what had happened. Jesus Feeds Five Thousand (Mark
text: Yohanes fɔtsa bakɔlɛnɛ a nabɔɛ ɔnɔkpa a bɛnabila, ade bɛnabɔa Yesu amandiɛ a. Yesu Kpa Bati Mpim Elo Funitsã Bɛnya.
translated: John the Baptist came to show people the way, so that through him everyone might believe in Jesus. Jesus is the True Light that Shines on Everyone.

ref: I promise that when any two of you on earth agree about something you are praying for, my Father in heaven will do it for you.
text: “Mabi mi mbu kĩ ntɛ mi kamɛ bati nviã mikɛna ɔmɔa nɛ litsedi akũ nɛ tite akũ, mɔ mibɔa mpaɛ mivia de ni, Nda nɛ ode a aakɛna foe ɛkpa mi.
translated: If I had known that this was how you would treat me, I would not have come to your aid when you were in trouble and needed help, now you have turned around to bite the hand that fed you.

ref: As Jesus was leaving that place, two blind men began following him and shouting, “Son of David, have pity on us!”
text: Kĩ Yesu to awã yanaa a, banɛkunɛ nviã badi tomɔ ye nɛ liti bɛkabɔa fɔwɔla kɔɔba kĩ, “Dawid obi, mɔ boe kɔnya!”
translated: And when Jesus heard it, he answered them saying, "They that are whole have no need of the physician, but they that are sick: I came not to call the righteous, but sinners to repentance."
